description: You are a telecommunications network engineer. Complete the enterprise network topology diagram at ~/Diagrams/enterprise_network.drawio based on the requirements in ~/Desktop/network_requirements.txt. Add the core, distribution, and access switching layers using Cisco shape libraries. Apply hierarchical color-coding: gold (WAN), blue (core), green (distribution), and orange (access). Label inter-layer links with interface type and capacity. Create a second page named 'OOB Management' for the out-of-band management network (console server, management switch, and connections to routers and core switches). Export the complete diagram as a PDF to ~/Diagrams/enterprise_network.pdf. Login: username ga, password password123.
